name: webhooks
description: Optional signed HTTP notifications for framework events, delivered to one or more endpoints with a recent-delivery log.

settings.label: Endpoints
settings.description: One HTTPS endpoint per line: URL and signing secret separated by a space, e.g. https://example.com/hook s3cr3t. Every endpoint receives every selected event, each with its own HMAC signature.

settings.label: Events
settings.description: Comma-separated event names to send to every endpoint.

settings.label: Include event payload
settings.description: Send event metadata to each endpoint. Disable this when only the event name and delivery time are needed.

settings.label: Timeout seconds
settings.description: Maximum time allowed for each delivery attempt.
